headline: How TE Connectivity plc (TEL) Turns Connectors Into an AI, EV, and Factory Automation Growth Story
summary: TE Connectivity plc (NYSE:TEL) is one of the best electrical equipment stocks to buy according to analysts. On June 8, Bell Global Equities Fund highlighted TE Connectivity as a new portfolio addition in its first-quarter investor letter. The fund framed TE Connectivity as a global leader in electrical connectors, with demand tied to components that […]
